rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is wholly unrelated to Gov't Code §2001.227, which concerns Texas Civil Commitment Office rules for sexually violent predators. No conflict exists.
quote: This chapter does not apply to a rule or internal procedure of the Texas Civil Commitment Office that applies to a person who is civilly committed as a sexually violent predator under Chapter 841, Health and Safety Code, or to an action taken under that rule or procedure.
_note: Rule text is topically unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict identified.
